_source_text:
MANHATTAN COMMUNITY BOARD 11
Land Use Committee Meeting
Monday, April 15, 2024, 6:30 PM
1664 Park Avenue, New York, NY 10035

AGENDA

Item 3. ULURP No. C 240045 ZMM — Zoning Map Amendment, 2289 Second Avenue

The applicant, East River Realty LLC, seeks approval of a zoning map amendment for the property at 2289 Second Avenue, New York, NY 10035 (Block 1823, Lot 5). The application proposes to rezone the site from R8 to R9A to facilitate the development of a 25-story mixed-use residential building containing approximately 280 dwelling units, including 20% affordable units.

The Committee will hear testimony from the applicant and members of the public. Written comments may be submitted to the Board office by April 29, 2024.
title: ULURP C 240045 ZMM — Zoning Map Amendment, 2289 Second Avenue
summary: Community Board 11 (Manhattan) Land Use Committee to hear a proposed zoning map amendment rezoning 2289 Second Avenue from R8 to R9A for a 25-story mixed-use residential building with 20% affordable units.
